title: kyllinga cylindrica f. latifolia
intro: Kyllinga cylindrica f. latifolia is a type of plant species in the Cyperaceae family, commonly known as the water pygmy-perch. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Kyllinga cylindrica f. latifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various ailments.
